title: connection_counter Relaxed ordering: admin election can observe wrong sequence on weak-memory arch
description: state.rs: connection_counter.fetch_add(1, Relaxed). Relaxed provides no ordering relative to surrounding DashMap writes. On ARM/POWER, a concurrent connection_seq() reader may see the incremented counter before the DashMap entry is visible. Admin election depends on coherent visibility; Acquire/Release ordering is needed for the fetch_add/get pair.
